headlines.title: Trump says deal to end Iran war will be signed Sunday, as Iran disagrees on timing
U.S. and Iran to close deal within a day, Trump says, but Tehran yet to confirm
SpaceX Opens At $150—Surging 20% After Largest IPO Ever
West Asia war LIVE: Israel strikes in Beirut delays U.S.-Iran peace deal by few hours, say reports
U.S. stocks rise after oil prices ease and SpaceX soars in its debut on Wall Street

notes: US Equities finished the week higher as the record-breaking SpaceX IPO boosted market sentiment and lifted AI infrastructure stocks.
Brent crude prices retreated sharply amid optimism that an imminent peace deal between the US and Iran could quickly reopen the Strait of Hormuz to commercial shipping.
Treasury yields remained elevated as the 10-year note climbed to 4.49% despite softer energy prices.
